title: Senior Doctor - Drishti Eye Care - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Drishti Eye Care - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care:
Drishti Eye Care is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care!
